# Rules for src/components/ConfigManager/ThreePaneEditor.tsx

<!-- Generated by proofd. Source: src/components/ConfigManager/ThreePaneEditor.tsx. Do not edit manually. -->

## Config Layout (config-layout)

- [CM-12] ThreePaneEditor: supports optional scopes prop to control visible columns. Claude/Hooks use all 3 scopes (User/Project/Local). MCP/Agents/Skills use 2 scopes (User/Project). Color coded: User=clay, Project=blue, Local=purple (left border + tinted header).

## Config Schema and Providers (config-schema)

- [CM-22] ThreePaneEditor scope headers show actual file paths per tab (e.g. ~/.claude/settings.json, {dir}/CLAUDE.md, {dir}/.claude/agents/) instead of generic directory stubs. Paths normalized to forward slashes via formatScopePath().
